coding_notes: Replicate 2 verdicts. DeepSeek dropped C7.2 ensemble critique but added C7.4 vendor-favoring critique (DRIFT in both directions). Anthropic produced 5 catches again (4 substantive + 1 confirmed-clean), same structure as r1. OpenAI produced 4 catches in r2 vs 3 in r1. Gemini produced 2 catches in r2 vs 2 in codified r1.

claims.claim_text: Critiques the 'less likely cross-vendor blind spot' claim as asserted-without-evidence; flags shared training data / RLHF / benchmark pressure as alternative.

deepseek.value_quoted: Catch 1: Push-back, shared pretraining data + convergent architectures + RLHF

gemini.value_quoted: Catch 1: Push-back, Common Crawl + Wikipedia + Transformers shared

openai.value_quoted: Catch 1: Partial, vendor boundary only weak proxy for epistemic independence

anthropic.value_quoted: Catch 1: Push-back, asymmetry cross-vendor > within-vendor needs evidence

claims.claim_text: Critiques the 'in the same way classical ensemble methods' analogy as overreaching.

deepseek.value_quoted: r2 dropped ensemble critique; only 2 catches

anthropic.value_quoted: Catch 2: bagging/boosting decorrelation vs vendor abstraction

claims.claim_text: Critiques 'cleanest available reflexive evidence' as overstating N=1 evidence weight.

deepseek.value_quoted: Catch 2: N=1 case study, single event cannot serve as general evidence

gemini.value_quoted: Catch 2: superlative overstates what N=1 can demonstrate

openai.value_quoted: Catch 4: 'too confident and self-validating for N=1'

anthropic.value_quoted: Catch 4: one anecdote cannot establish guard 'applies' as general property

claims.claim_text: Catches the Anthropic-favorable / drafter-favoring framing in the passage (the brief explicitly asked reviewers to look for this).

deepseek.value_quoted: Catch 2 explicit: 'elevating the drafting vendor's contribution' - DRIFT from r1 ignore

gemini.value_quoted: r2 dropped vendor-bias catch (DRIFT vs r1 affirm)

openai.value_quoted: Catch 4: 'subtly over-credit the drafter rather than the cross-vendor review structure'

anthropic.value_quoted: DEDICATED Catch 4 on vendor-favoring framing - same as r1

claims.claim_text: Number of substantive catches emitted on the passage (more aggressive review = higher).
